data.title: Microservices Infrastructure
data.description: Netflix's backend architecture is based on microservices, allowing for independent deployment and scaling.

data.title: Cloud-Based Deployment
data.description: The platform is deployed on cloud services, ensuring scalability and availability.

data.title: CDN Integration
data.description: Content delivery is optimized through global CDN networks for lower latency.

data.title: Serverless Architecture
data.description: Certain functions leverage serverless computing for agility and cost-efficiency.

data.title: Load Balancing
data.description: Strategic load balancing ensures consistent service availability and performance.
